extraction.one_line_summary: DENIFL Stefan held off CONTADOR Alberto's late attack on Los Machucos' 30% slopes, taking breakthrough win as FROOME Chris cracked badly losing 1:20.
tactical_patterns: CONTADOR Alberto attacked steep ramps to exploit FROOME's time trial fatigue, gaining 1:20 despite missing stage win by 28 seconds.
NIBALI Vincenzo used NIEVE Mikel pacing on steep slopes to distance FROOME, gaining 42 seconds with team support tactics.
CHAVES Esteban launched supported by ATAPUMA Darwin before final climb, revealing Orica's willingness to spend domestiques early on steep finishes.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: showed clear weakness day after time trial effort, unable to respond to any attacks on 30% gradients
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: relentless attacking on steep slopes gained 1:20 on leader, proving super-steep finishes remain his strength
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: strong team-supported ride gained 42 seconds on race leader, using NIEVE's pacing effectively
rider_signals.DENIFL Stefan: positive: held off late chase from breakaway position on brutal gradient, revealing strong climbing form
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: retained podium position at 1:20 behind leader with CONTADOR closing gap to same margin
